subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The tidings of thy arrival in Beirut were received with joy and fragrance. These tidings became the cause of supreme gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد خبر ورود آنحضرت در بیروت بروح و ریحان رسید اینخبر سبب فرح اکبر شد
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power of love
